factors.rationale: The product is the single dominant focal point and fills enough of the frame to identify instantly.
The accessory is shown being held, indicating a clear use moment.
The text clearly states a specific benefit related to grip and ruggedness.
The arrangement of product, text, and background elements is clear and easy to follow.
The image showcases the texture and details of the case effectively.
The brand name is prominently displayed, providing a strong trust signal.
The text and product have strong contrast, making them easily readable.
The image conveys a clear campaign intent with a narrative tied to the product benefit.
